name: Pizza Style Cube Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the cube steak with salad oil and lemon zest.
2. Broil on one side for 5 minutes until browned.
3. Turn the steak and sprinkle with herbs (dill weed, rosemary).
4. Broil for another 5 minutes on the other side.
5. Turn off the broiler and top with cheese and tomato slices.
6. Serve on toast.
